channel.title: mbAInewsletter
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from mbAInewsletter, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai says AI spending still makes sense despite bubble fears

item.description: Proponents say orbital data centers could solve AIâs power and cooling crunch. Experts say that vision is far more distant than the hype suggests.
